title: Quoowiit Rustic Ceramic Vase Distressed Home Decor Shelf Decor Yellow Bohemian Vase for Living Room Bedroom Kitchen Office Table Centerpiece Table Decoration
features: 【Ceramic Material】 This rustic ceramic vase crafted from high quality ceramic, suitable for indoor and outdoor occasions. This long-lasting high-quality ceramic flower vase will decorates your beloved home year after year, bringing you good and peaceful mood.

【Distressed Finish】 The rustic vase is designed with retro and distressed surface. The shape of flower vase is round and lovely. Two handles on sides are easy to move and decorate whole ceramic vase, enhancing your interior style design and show your elegant artistic taste.

【Versatile Function】 The vintage vase is 6 inches tall, enough to hold decorative items. The opening at top is 4.1 inches, big enough put amount of flowers you want. You can use it to decorate with fresh or dried flowers. And it can be used as a elegant organizer, suitable for storing keys, kitchen utensils, pens or others.

【Multi-Occasion】 This farmhouse vase is not just for flowers, it’s also a great choice as home decor peice: a stand-alone centerpiece. Suitable to decorative your living room, kitchen, bedroom, bathroom, farmhouse, office, coffee table, bookshelf, entryway, cabinet, etc.

【Breathtaking Gift】This unique and functional decorative flower vase is not only a beautiful home decor, shelf decor and home centerpieces, but also a charming gifts for birthday, housewarmings, weddings, anniversaries, Christmas, New Year or other special occasions.
description: Quoowiit Ceramic Rustic Vase How you define a great vase? Quoowiit farmhouse vase is the correct answer. First, it should be beautiful and be the centerpiece of your home decor. Secondly, it should have enough space to hold all kinds of flowers and accommodate your creative combinations. It should also have two small 'ears' so that you can move it more easily and safely. By the way, it has a large enough opening can also put down unexpected items such as kitchenware, keys, pens or other items. With its lovely appearance and smooth surface, you can not only buy it for your own use, but it is also a great gift for your friends and family during the holidays. We have perfect after-sales service and production line, if you have any difficulties in purchasing and using, please contact us. We will reply you ASAP, help you solve the problem and improve our products according to your feedback.
